title: Caring Together: Role-Differentiated Empathic Multi-Agent System Research Artifact
description: Source code, role prompts, agent-selection logic, deployment configuration, and validation tests for Wiingle. This artifact accompanies the manuscript 'Caring Together: Designing a Role-Differentiated Empathic Multi-Agent System Inspired by Peer-Support Principles,' currently under review. It contains no participant data or submitted manuscript files.

creators.name: Park, Yejin

creators.affiliation: Graduate School of Communication and Arts, Yonsei University

notes: Version 1.1.0 aligns the runtime with the manuscript by using sequential LangGraph orchestration, shared-state peer-response context, an explicit six-module prompt structure, and a guardrail against fictional self-disclosure. The associated manuscript is currently under review. Participant data are not included because the authors do not have permission to share them.
